standalone.name: HALO UNSC CLASSIC
standalone.description: Dark military greens, UNSC steel, and Spartan blue accents with a frosted-glass dashboard, inspired by Halo 1-3.

themeOptions.name: HALO UNSC CLASSIC

themeOptions.name: DRACULA
